story.iWant: proje genelinde kullanılabilir hash-based caching system
story.soThat: tüm modüllerde cache ihtiyacı olan operasyonlar için reusable cache servisi kullanabilirim

tasks.task: NestJS Cache Module Integration implement et

acceptanceCriteria.ac: CacheService oluşturulmuş - src/common/services/cache.service.ts, Dependencies: NestJS @nestjs/cache-manager, Cache instance (injected via CACHE_MANAGER), Default TTL: 1 hour (3600000ms), Generic type support

generateCacheKey() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: generateCacheKey(prefix: string, ...parts: any[]): string, Generic key generation: {prefix}:{hash(parts)}, SHA-256 hash, Consistent hash
get<T>() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: get<T>(key: string): Promise<T | null>, Retrieve cached value, Cache miss durumunda null return
set<T>() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: set<T>(key: string, value: T, ttl?: number): Promise<void>, Store value with optional TTL, Default TTL: 3600000ms
delete() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: delete(key: string): Promise<void>, Invalidate cache entry, Idempotent
clear() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: clear(): Promise<void>, Clear all cache entries
SHA-256 Hash Generation implement edilmiş - generateDataHash() private method, sortObjectKeys() private method, Recursive key sorting, SHA-256 hash (64 hex characters)
NestJS Cache Module Integration implement edilmiş - Global CacheModule.register(), Redis store configuration, Environment variables, Connection pooling
CommonModule Export implement edilmiş - CacheService exported from src/common/services/index.ts, Available to all modules
Unit Tests implement edilmiş - Test file: src/common/services/__tests__/cache.service.spec.ts, Coverage: > 80%
Integration Tests implement edilmiş - CacheModule registration test, CommonModule export/import test, Redis mock/container integration test

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Common Cache & Retry Services

docs.doc: Epic 6.5 technical specification covering CacheService and RetryService design, APIs, workflows, and integration points.
Epic-level story breakdown with acceptance criteria, technical notes, and usage examples for CacheService.
Previous story learnings including CacheService placeholder interface, cache key format, and TTL defaults.
Project structure documentation showing common module organization and service location patterns.
Mandatory patterns for module structure, import organization (8-group order), and service patterns.
Testing standards including Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, coverage requirements (80%+), and test structure.
Story document with architecture patterns, constraints, source tree components, and testing standards.

file.reason: Placeholder interface for CacheService that will be implemented in this story. Shows expected method signatures: generateCacheKey(), get(), set()
DocumentGeneratorService uses CacheService via injection token CACHE_SERVICE_TOKEN. Shows how CacheService will be integrated
Example of Global module pattern. CacheService will be exported via CommonModule similarly
Example of Global module pattern with service export. CommonModule should follow similar pattern
AppModule shows how to register global modules. CacheModule.register() should be added here

package.name: @nestjs/cache-manager
package.note: Required for CacheService - NestJS cache manager integration

package.name: cache-manager
package.note: Required for CacheService - Cache store interface

package.name: cache-manager-redis-store
package.note: Required for CacheService - Redis store adapter

constraints.constraint: Service Pattern: CacheService must use NestJS dependency injection with CACHE_MANAGER token
Module Structure: CacheService must be located at src/common/services/cache.service.ts
Export Pattern: CacheService must be exported from src/common/services/index.ts and available via CommonModule
Hash Algorithm: SHA-256 hash must use Node.js crypto.createHash('sha256')
Key Format: Cache keys must follow pattern {prefix}:{hash(parts)} with 64 hex character hash
Consistent Hash: sortObjectKeys() must ensure {a:1, b:2} and {b:2, a:1} produce same hash
Error Handling: Cache miss must return null (no error thrown), cache failures gracefully handled
TTL Default: Default TTL must be 3600000ms (1 hour), configurable per operation
Import Organization: Must follow 8-group import order: Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events
Testing: Unit tests must achieve > 80% coverage, use Arrange-Act-Assert pattern
Redis Config: Redis configuration must use environment variables (REDIS_HOST, REDIS_PORT, REDIS_PASSWORD, REDIS_DB)
Generic Types: All methods must support generic type <T> for any TypeScript type

interface.name: ICacheService
interface.signature: export interface ICacheService { generateCacheKey(documentType: string, templateName: string, data: any): string; get(key: string): Promise<string | null>; set(key: string, value: string, ttl?: number): Promise<void>; }

tests.standards: Unit tests must follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Test coverage target: > 80%. Use Jest testing framework. Mock CacheManager using jest.fn(). Test all methods: generateCacheKey(), get<T>(), set<T>(), delete(), clear(). Test hash consistency, generic type support, TTL behavior, cache miss scenarios, and error handling.
tests.locations: Unit tests: src/common/services/__tests__/cache.service.spec.ts Integration tests: test/ directory (to be created)

ideas.test: Test generateCacheKey() with various input types (string, number, object, array)
Test hash consistency: {a:1, b:2} and {b:2, a:1} produce same hash
Test get<T>() cache hit scenario - returns cached value
Test get<T>() cache miss scenario - returns null (no error)
Test set<T>() with TTL - value stored with specified TTL
Test set<T>() with default TTL - value stored with default 3600000ms
Test delete() cache invalidation - entry removed
Test delete() idempotent behavior - no error on cache miss
Test clear() - all cache entries cleared
Test sortObjectKeys() recursive sorting with nested objects and arrays
Test generic type support - string, number, object, array types
Test cache failures gracefully handled - no errors thrown
Test CommonModule export/import - service available to other modules
